summary: Implemented KYC duplicate CCCD flow: users can submit without duplicate error; removed submit block and KycProfiles CccdNumber UNIQUE (entity + seeder migration); staff approve blocked if CCCD already on another account; staff kyc-review duplicate warnings unchanged. Admin /users: server search ?q= by name/email/phone/CCCD including latest KycProfiles CCCD, search UI with CCCD column. KYC OCR: manual Quét CCCD button, friendly Gemini 429 message, OCR optional for submit.
current_status: Plan items A/B/C and OCR UX delivered. Restart backend to apply DB constraint drop on startup. Test: submit KYC with duplicate CCCD, verify staff warning, admin user search, manual OCR scan.
